zh.Worsley Booth, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾沃斯利
zh.Lower Booths, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾洛維爾 布斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Cicely Bromhall於大約1322年出生在英國時，她的父親Richard de Bromhall I58歲，母親Mrs. Margery Bromhall64歲。她於1318年之前與Robert de Worsley Lord of Booths在英國藍卡爾克雷頓 勒 伍茲結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1339年之後。

zh-hans.Worsley Booth, Lancashire, England: 英国英格兰藍卡爾沃斯利
zh-hans.Lower Booths, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾洛維爾 布斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cicely Bromhall于大约1322年出生在英国时，她的父亲Richard de Bromhall I58岁，母亲Mrs. Margery Bromhall64岁。她于1318年之前与Robert de Worsley Lord of Booths在英国藍卡爾克雷頓 勒 伍茲结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1339年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Bromhall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Broomhall
meanings: habitational name from Broomhall (Cheshire), Broomhall Grange in Tyrley and Broom Hall Farm in Brewood (both Staffordshire), Broomhall Farms in Kempsey (Worcestorshire), or Broomhall in Sunningdale (Berkshire, formerly in Windlesham in Surrey), all of which take their name from Old English brōm ‘broom, gorse’ + halh ‘nook, hollow’.
variant of the similar Cheshire name Bramhall , which also has early forms in -o-.

nameMeanings.name: Cicely
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

variants.name: Cecily
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Cicely Bromhall was born about 1322, in England, her father, Richard de Bromhall I, was 58 and her mother, Mrs. Margery Bromhall, was 64. She married Robert de Worsley Lord of Booths before 1318, in Clayton Le Woods, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died after 1339.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cicely Bromhall est née environ 1322, à Angleterre, son père, Richard de Bromhall I, avait 58 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Margery Bromhall, avait 64 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Worsley Lord of Booths avant 1318, à Clayton Le Woods, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée après 1339.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cicely Bromhall um 1322 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard de Bromhall I 58 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Margery Bromhall 64. Sie hat vor 1318 in Clayton Le Woods, Lancashire, England Robert de Worsley Lord of Booths geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1339.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cicely Bromhall è nata il circa 1322 nel England, sua padre, Richard de Bromhall I, aveva 58 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Margery Bromhall, aveva 64 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Worsley Lord of Booths prima del 1318, nel Clayton Le Woods, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì dopo il 1339.

ja.lifeSummary: Cicely Bromhallが約1322年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Richard de Bromhall Iは58歳，母Mrs. Margery Bromhallは64歳であった。1318年以前にイギリスランカシュアイアクレイトン ル ウッドスでRobert de Worsley Lord of Boothsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1339年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cicely Bromhall(이)가 대략 1322년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Bromhall I(은)는 58세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Margery Bromhall(은)는 64세였다. 그녀는 1318년 이전 영국 랭카실르 클레이턴 일 우드즈에서 Robert de Worsley Lord of Booths(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1339년 이후 사망했다.

mn.Worsley Booth, Lancashire, England: Worsley, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cicely Bromhall nasceu aproximadamente 1322, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Bromhall I, tinha 58 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Margery Bromhall, tinha 64 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Worsley Lord of Booths antes 1318, em Clayton Le Woods, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1339.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cicely Bromhall родилась около 1322 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Richard de Bromhall I было 58 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Margery Bromhall, 64. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Worsley Lord of Booths перед 1318 г. в местности клеитон л вудс, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла после 1339 г.

sm.about 1322–after 1339: e tusa o le 1322–ina ua ma'ea le 1339

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cicely Bromhall nació aproximadamente 1322, en Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Bromhall I, tenía 58 años y su mamá, Mrs. Margery Bromhall, tenía 64 años. Se casó con Robert de Worsley Lord of Booths antes de 1318, en Clayton Le Woods, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió después de 1339.
